author: gb9t
content: Iteration 21: scsi/megaraid-sas.md committed (84597a1, 206 lines). LSI/Broadcom MegaRAID — dominant enterprise RAID HBA. Every Dell PERC + HP P-Series + Lenovo TS RAID + Supermicro. ~16100 LOC. Two silicon families: MFI mailbox legacy + Fusion DMA-direct modern + Fast-Path driver-side LD bypass. Rust translation: typed MFI cmd, RAID map atomic via RCU, Fast-Path LBA bounds-checked. Grsec: /dev/megaraid_sas chardev historical CVE source (CVE-2021-39685 + CVE-2019-19528 + CVE-2020-12114) — defenses CAP_SYS_RAWIO + opcode allowlist + sg-list cap + destructive-op CAP_SYS_ADMIN + Fast-Path bounds-check (closes corrupt-RAID-map-wrong-disk-write class). Storage tier complete (4 families): mpt3sas + qla2xxx + lpfc + aacraid + megaraid_sas. Session totals: 21 docs / ~1.44M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/net/ethernet/intel/ixgbe (Intel 10G NIC — huge installed base in older datacenters, still ships in many new servers).
